title: Stat Contract (Base_Attributes.yaml) + StatOverrides blocks
description: Validates Attributes/Base_Attributes.yaml's structured DerivedStats shape, and (via #/definitions/StatOverride) the StatOverrides blocks class Design files use to declare formal deviations. PENDING is a first-class coefficient state meaning 'balance number intentionally not yet decided' — tools must surface it and never invent a value.

Attributes.description: Tier 1 — investable base attributes with default values.

DerivedStats.description: Tier 2 — computed stats. Uniform machine-checkable shape.

Inputs.description: Tier-1 attributes and external terms (e.g. Gear_Defense, WeaponType) feeding this stat.

Formula.description: Expression referencing Inputs and named Coefficients. Legacy '[coeff_TBD]'-style bracket placeholders are forbidden — name the coefficient and mark it PENDING instead.

Prose.description: Design rationale / rules text. Human+LLM context; not parsed by tools.

Value.description: A number once balanced, or the literal PENDING while undecided.

OverridesDerivedStat.description: Which central derived stat (or sub-formula, dot-pathed e.g. EffectiveDefense.DamageReduction) this class deviates from.

Scope.description: Exactly when/where the override applies — the deviation's boundary.

Interaction.description: Whether the override replaces the central formula inside its scope, or stacks on top of it.

Reason.description: WHY the deviation exists — the design argument, not just the math.
